x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how transactions or requests are handled internally by the system.
:
Comment:
Includes workflows, validation steps, timing, and decision rules.

Example: Loan applications must be processed within 48 hours and routed for approval based on credit score.
Focus: Execution flow of operations

Loan payment must be processed before end-of-day cutoff

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions related to clearing and settlement

Comment:
Example:
Card transactions settle through Visa network nightly

x-enumeration-literals.name: Validation Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Required operational validations before execution

Comment:
Example:
AML screening required before international transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Approval or permission needed for operations

Comment:
Example:
Supervisor approval required above €10,000 transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Operational monitoring and alerting obligations

Comment:
Example:
Fraud monitoring applied to all card transactions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Matching and balancing operational records

Comment:
Example:
Daily ATM cash reconciliation required

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Regulatory or policy-driven operational obligations

Comment:
Example:
PSD2 strong customer authentication required

x-enumeration-literals.name: Availability Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Operational uptime or service availability needs

Comment:
Example:
Mobile banking available 24/7

x-enumeration-literals.name: Maintenance Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Scheduled maintenance or servicing rules

Comment:
Example:
Monthly interest recalculation batch job

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Handling Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Procedures for failed or abnormal operations

Comment:
Example:
Retry processing for failed payment settlement

x-enumeration-literals.name: SLA Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Performance and turnaround obligations    

Comment:
Example:
Wire transfer processed within 30 minutes

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduling Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the timing, frequency, sequencing, and execution conditions under which an operational activity, task, process, or service must occur within a system or business process.
